# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-06-01-preview'
      name: appServicePlan
      type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
      properties:
        sku: Y1
        tier: Standard
        location: eastus

    - apiVersion: '2019-04-01'
      name: webApp
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      dependsOn: [appServicePlan]
      properties:
        serverFarmId: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/{appServicePlan}
        siteConfig:
          linuxFxVersion: DOCKER|mcr.microsoft.com/azure-php/php:7.3
        scmSiteAlwaysOn: true
        clientAffinityEnabled: false
        alwaysOn: true
        appSettings:
          - name: MyApp_ConnectionString
            value: {SQL_CONNECTION_STRING}
        hostNameType: 'Shared'
        hostNameSslStates: Enabled

    - apiVersion: '2017-12-01'
      name: sqlServer
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
      location: eastus
      properties:
        administratorLogin: adminuser
        administratorLoginPassword: {PASSWORD}

    - apiVersion: '2018-06-01'
      name: sqlDatabase
      type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
      dependsOn: [sqlServer]
      properties:
        server: {sqlServer}
        creationDate: UTCTimestamp()
        requestedServiceObjectiveName: S0
        edition: Basic
        maxSizeBytes: 104857600
        collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
        name: mydb

    - apiVersion: '2017-06-01'
      name: storageAccount
      type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
      location: eastus
      properties:
        accountType: Standard_LRS
